User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Salon Chair application, including public customers, salon owners, and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user, used for SMS/WhatsApp notifications.

role.description: The role of the user within the application. (Values: PublicUser, SalonOwner, Admin)

noShowFlagsCount.description: The cumulative count of no-show flags received by the user.

banUntil.description: The date and time until which the user is banned due to excessive no-shows, if applicable. (Null if not banned)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account information was last updated.

Salon.title: Salon
Salon.description: Represents a salon registered on the Salon Chair platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Salon entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who owns this salon. (Relationship: User 1:N Salon)

name.description: The official name of the salon.

description.description: A brief description of the salon, its specialties, or ambiance.

address.description: The full street address of the salon.

landmark.description: A prominent landmark near the salon for easier navigation.

city.description: The city where the salon is located, used for filtering.

state.description: The state where the salon is located, used for filtering.

imageUrl.description: The URL or data URI of the salon's front-side photo.

latitude.description: Geographical latitude of the salon's location.

longitude.description: Geographical longitude of the salon's location.

isVerifiedByAdmin.description: Indicates whether the salon has been verified and authorized by an admin.

isActive.description: Indicates if the salon is currently active and visible to public users, based on subscription status and admin verification.

subscriptionId.description: Reference to the current Subscription for this salon. (Relationship: Subscription 1:N Salon)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the salon was first registered.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the salon's information was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a specific service offered by a salon.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

salonId.description: Reference to the Salon offering this service. (Relationship: Salon 1:N Service)

description.description: A detailed description of what the service entails.

price.description: The price of the service in the local currency (₹).

durationMinutes.description: The estimated duration of the service in minutes.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents a booking request or confirmed appointment made by a customer with a salon.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Appointment entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Public User who made the appointment. (Relationship: User 1:N Appointment)

salonId.description: Reference to the Salon for which the appointment is made. (Relationship: Salon 1:N Appointment)

serviceIds.description: References to the Services booked in this appointment. (Relationship: Service N:N Appointment)

requestedDateTime.description: The date and time requested by the customer for the appointment.

status.description: The current status of the appointment. (Values: Pending, Accepted, Rejected, Completed, Cancelled, NoShow)

ownerResponseDateTime.description: Timestamp when the salon owner responded to the appointment request.

requestSentDateTime.description: Timestamp when the appointment request was initially sent by the customer.

notes.description: Any special notes or requests from the customer for the appointment.

rejectionReason.description: The reason provided by the salon owner if the appointment was rejected.

estimatedTotalAmount.description: The estimated total amount for all services booked in this appointment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the appointment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the appointment record was last updated.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single message in an appointment chat.
